rulings.Case Title: SCOTT HODGES VS. SONYA WASHINGTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Compelling Responses To Req For Production Of Docs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 16, 2013, line 8. PLAINTIFF SCOTT HODGES' Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Request For Production and Appearance for Deposition GRANTED, subject to opposition as follows: Defendant shall appeared for deposition at 10:00 a.m. on December 19, 2013 at the offices of Plaintiff's counsel; Defendant shall provide response to request for production without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $350 to be paid within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to prepare order and serve it personally no later than December 17, 2013 by 10:00 a.m. = (501/JJM)

rulings.Case Title: HELENA HUOH VS. ARIEL BENTOLILA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel The Deposition Of Pltff Helena Huoh
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, December 16, 2013, line 14. DEFENDANT ARIEL BENTOLILA and ABENET TEKIE's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Plaintiff Helena Huoh GRANTED. Plaintiff shall appear for deposition on December 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. or on any other weekday set by defendant no later than December 27, 2013. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,885 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/JJM)
